name: Locksmith
title: AI Tools for Locksmith Businesses | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for locksmiths — catch lockout calls 24/7, dispatch fast, and follow up. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500. No long contracts.
hero_lede: A lockout is an urgent call — the customer is stranded and will call the next number in seconds. We build the tools that answer instantly, dispatch fast, and never let that call slip away.
drains: Lockout calls coming in around the clock that must be answered now
Dispatch scramble when calls land while you're on a job
Commercial and rekey quotes that go quiet with no follow-up
The owner answering every call personally, day and night

tools.title: 24/7 lockout line
tools.body: An AI assistant answers every call instantly, gets the location and situation, gives an honest arrival estimate, and dispatches your nearest tech — so a stranded customer becomes your job, not the next listing's.

tools.title: Commercial-quote follow-up
tools.body: Rekey, master-key, and access-control quotes get tracked and followed up, so higher-ticket commercial work doesn't slip away after the first call.

tools.title: Arrival & review assistant
tools.body: Customers get a confirmed arrival window and, after the job, a personalized review request — the reviews that drive locksmith leads.

tools.title: Morning job brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's scheduled jobs, tech assignments, commercial quotes open, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A locksmith business with the owner answering every call.
cases.before: Calls came in around the clock; missed ones went straight to a competitor.
cases.after: An AI assistant answers every call instantly and dispatches the nearest tech.
cases.impact: Representative result: far fewer lockout calls lost to voicemail and faster dispatch.

cases.context: A locksmith with no follow-up on commercial quotes.
cases.before: Rekey and access-control quotes went quiet after the first conversation.
cases.after: Every commercial quote tracked and followed up automatically.
cases.impact: Representative result: more higher-ticket commercial jobs closed.

faq.q: Can it handle lockout calls at 3 AM?
faq.a: That's exactly what it's built for. The assistant answers instantly, gets the location, gives an honest ETA, and dispatches your nearest available tech — day or night.

faq.q: Does it help with commercial work?
faq.a: Yes. Commercial quotes — rekeys, master-key systems, access control — get tracked and followed up so higher-value jobs don't slip away.

faq.q: Will it work with my software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever scheduling and dispatch tools you already use.
